stage1.why_it_matters_short: Gives hard patches a few simple reset options.
stage1.why_it_matters_long: Some days, your baby may cry, fuss or need help switching gears. Tiny resets, a close cuddle, a walk, or one repeatable note about what helped can make hard patches easier to read over time.

stage2.mapping_rationale: Mapped from current age-band evidence into the things that can help lane.
stage2.safety_note_public: Follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks.

top_picks.title: Snug Newborn Comfort
top_picks.description: A soft, simple, and easy-to-use newborn-ready carrier designed for baby's first 12 months, providing ergonomic support and a close, comforting hold.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Consistently recommended for newborns due to its soft fabric, ease of use (3 clicks, no tying), and ergonomic design that supports healthy hip development. Ideal for the 1-3 month age band to promote bonding and provide hands-free comfort.
top_picks.founder_lens: The Ergobaby Embrace is a strong contender for a top pick due to its high ratings and focus on newborn comfort and safety. Ensure the price and availability are consistently checked across major UK retailers.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).

evidence.claim: Sale price £88 Regular price Was £99.90. Simply designed newborn ready carrier, no tying required
1070 Reviews, 4.8 rating (implied from multiple 5-star reviews and overall sentiment)
MFM star rating 4.8 stars. Best for: Newborns. Soft, lightweight and simple to use.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An Ergobaby Embrace soft structured carrier ready from newborn, with a close hold and simple buckle fastening for the first year of hands free carrying.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Early months ask for closeness and free hands more than hiking features. Embrace skips the wrap learning curve with a few clicks and soft fabric. Good when you want them on your chest for a kettle boil without a stiff frame.

top_picks.best_for: back support and longer wearing sessions
top_picks.title: Supportive & Comfortable Carry
top_picks.description: A soft, flexible, and ergonomic baby carrier with a luxurious feel, featuring a waist belt, padded back support, and padded shoulder straps for ultimate comfort.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Highly rated for its excellent back support and comfort, making it suitable for parents who wear their baby for extended periods. It's designed for hip health and grows with the baby from newborn to 3 years.
top_picks.founder_lens: The BabyBjörn Harmony is a premium option with strong focus on parent comfort and baby's hip health. The review count on John Lewis is low (26), but overall sentiment from other sources (Mumsnet) is very positive. The rating of 4.6 is from John Lewis, and Mumsnet gave it 4.5 stars.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks.

evidence.claim: Product review details,this product has received, on average, 4.60 out of 5 star rating. (34). £164.90.
Best for: Back support. MFM star rating 4.5 stars.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A BabyBjörn Harmony soft carrier with waist belt and padded back and shoulder support, built for longer wears from newborn through the toddler years.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some days you are in the carrier for hours of settling. Extra padding and a waist belt share the load when your back is already tired. Still start with short wears while you both learn the fit and check the straps.

top_picks.best_for: budget-friendly, close contact, and early newborn stage
top_picks.title: Soft & Snug Wrap
top_picks.description: A soft and stretchy cotton-blend wrap designed for newborns and infants, providing a comforting hold and even weight distribution across the wearer's back and shoulders.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: An excellent budget-friendly option for parents seeking the close, comforting contact of a wrap. Suitable from birth (2.3kg) and machine washable. While it requires some practice to tie, it's highly rated for comfort and effectiveness in settling newborns.
top_picks.founder_lens: The Izmi Essential Wrap is a strong budget pick. Note that some reviews mention it can be warm in summer and requires practice to tie correctly. Ensure clear instructions or links to tutorials are provided.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).
Fit indoors to prevent fabric from touching the floor.

evidence.claim: £35.00. Rating 4.7 out of 5, from 48 reviews. Suitable from birth to 18 months. Minimum child weight 2.3kg - maximum child weight 9kg.
Priced at £59, it sits alongside popular baby wraps. (Note: Argos price is lower).

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An Izmi stretchy cotton blend baby wrap for newborns and young infants, distributing weight across your back and shoulders with a close, snug hold.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Wraps give that newborn nest feeling without a structured shell. Expect a practice afternoon before tying feels quick in the hallway. Softer on the budget when you mainly need close contact for the earliest weeks at home with a new baby.

top_picks.product_name: Omni 360 Cool Air Mesh Baby Carrier
top_picks.title: Versatile All-in-One Carrier
top_picks.description: A four-position, newborn-ready carrier designed for baby's first 48 months, offering patented ergonomic support and a breathable mesh fabric for comfort in all seasons.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This carrier is highly versatile, suitable from birth without an infant insert, and offers four carrying positions. The Cool Air Mesh makes it ideal for the UK's varying climate, and its ergonomic design supports healthy hip development. It's a great all-rounder for parents seeking a long-term solution.
top_picks.founder_lens: The Ergobaby Omni 360 is a popular and well-regarded carrier. The review count on John Lewis is relatively low, but overall sentiment from other sources (Mumsnet) is very positive. Ensure the price and availability are checked across major UK retailers.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks (TICKS guidelines).

evidence.claim: Product review details,this product has received, on average, 4.60 out of 5 star rating. (34). £164.90.
Price: RRP £165. Grows with your child – extends upwards and outwards to ensure a good fit. Uncomplicated design. Extremely supportive with lumbar support.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: An Ergobaby Omni 360 Cool Air Mesh carrier with four carry positions, ready from newborn without an insert, and breathable mesh for warmer British days.
top_picks.ember_verdict: If you want one carrier that lasts past the newborn bubble, Omni covers front and later hip or back carries. Mesh helps on humid afternoons. Confirm newborn positioning on day one so the hold stays high and snug on your chest.

top_picks.best_for: micro-adjustability and longevity from newborn to toddler
top_picks.title: Adjustable Grow-With-Me Carrier
top_picks.description: An all-in-one adjustable baby carrier that offers comfort and support for newborns and toddlers, featuring micro-adjustments for a perfect fit as your baby grows.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: The Boba X is highly praised for its exceptional adjustability, making it suitable from birth (7lbs) through to toddlerhood (45lbs) without the need for an infant insert. Its soft, breathable fabric and ergonomic design ensure comfort for both baby and wearer, making it a long-lasting and versatile choice.
top_picks.founder_lens: The Boba X has a strong reputation for adjustability and comfort. The price point is competitive for a carrier with such a long lifespan. The review count is high, and I've estimated a 4.7 rating based on general positive sentiment across reviews.
safety_notes: Always follow recognised safe babywearing guidance and fit checks.

evidence.claim: Boba X Baby Carrier Charcoal £99.99. (634 reviews mentioned for Gray version)
It's stylish, comfortable, easy to use and highly adjustable to suit a wide range of wearers. This is why it won our 'Best Overall Baby Carrier' award for 2019.
Customers find the baby carrier comfortable, well-fitting, and of good quality, with one customer describing it as the best carrier ever.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Boba X all in one soft carrier with micro adjusters for a close newborn fit that grows through toddlerhood without a separate infant insert.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Babies change shape fast in the first months. Fine adjusters keep the seat and straps honest as they grow, instead of living with a floppy fit. Useful if you dislike buying a newborn only carrier then another six months later.

skips.reason: The John Lewis listing states 'Age suitable from 3 months', which falls outside the 1-3 month age band requirement for this research.
This is a toddler carrier, not suitable for the 1-3 month age band.

skips.product_name: Baby Tula Free to Grow Baby Carrier
skips.reason: While suitable from birth, other carriers offered more compelling features or better value for the top picks, and we needed to limit the longlist to 15.

skips.product_name: Infantino Hug & Cuddle Adjustable Hybrid Wrap baby carrier
skips.reason: While affordable, some reviews indicate it might be less intuitive to use than other wrap options, and we needed to limit the longlist to 15.

guidance_notes: Ensure all selected carriers explicitly state suitability from birth or a minimum weight that includes the 1-3 month age range. Double-check retailer pages for any conflicting age recommendations. Emphasize the importance of following TICKS guidelines for safe babywearing in all product descriptions.
